description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a modern, minimalist design. The front features two large, flat-faced drawers with small, round key locks, and no visible handles, giving it a sleek appearance. The sides and top are finished in a dark wood or laminate, while the front panels are a lighter, smooth surface, likely painted or laminated. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. The construction suggests a sturdy build, suitable for storing documents or office supplies securely. Its overall look is professional and would fit well in contemporary office or urban environments.
description: A modern, two-drawer filing cabinet with a dark wood finish and light front panels, featuring key locks and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two light-colored, flat-faced drawers with small round locks and no visible handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the dark wood or laminate finish with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid dark panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a dark wood or laminate finish and no features.
